input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.5.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.5.2.2
            TITLE: the current operating condition will be decided by the officials and may change at any time.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.5.2.2: The current operating condition will be decided by the Officials and may change at any time.
D.5.2.2 The current operating condition will be decided by the Officials and may change at any time.

final_answer: The current operating condition will be decided by the Officials and may change at any time.
